generated_oml:
instance WheelSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures rotational speed of each wheel for vehicle dynamics monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WheelSpeedTransmitted
]

instance LateralAccelerationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures lateral acceleration of the vehicle chassis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LateralAccelerationTransmitted
]

instance YawRateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures rotational rate around the vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData YawRateTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures steering wheel angle for directional control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleTransmitted
]

instance SuspensionDisplacementSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures displacement of suspension components"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SuspensionDisplacementTransmitted
]

instance WheelSpeedTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WheelSpeedSensor
]

instance LateralAccelerationTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LateralAccelerationSensor
]

instance YawRateTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom YawRateSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance SuspensionDisplacementTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SuspensionDisplacementSensor
]

instance WheelSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw wheel speed measurements from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WheelSpeedTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimatorEnabler, ModelCalibrationEnabler
]

instance LateralAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw lateral acceleration measurements from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LateralAccelerationTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimatorEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance YawRateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw yaw rate measurements from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData YawRateTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimatorEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw steering angle measurements from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SupervisoryControllerEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler
]

instance SuspensionDisplacementData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw suspension displacement measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SuspensionDisplacementTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetectionEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance VehicleGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD-based geometric representation of vehicle chassis and structural elements"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler
]

instance VehicleDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using differential equations for vehicle dynamics analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, ModelCalibrationEnabler
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Combines CAD tools and analytical models for simulating vehicle dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for continuous safety and performance monitoring using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ModelCalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for calibrating model parameters using real-time sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithmic fault detection techniques for vehicle components"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimatorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for estimating vehicle system states from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance OptimizerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for optimizing vehicle performance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance SupervisoryControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithmic technique for implementing supervisory control actions"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reproduces and predicts physical vehicle behavior under current operating conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight, PredictedStateInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors safety and optimal performance through continuous sensor data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, PerformanceOptimizationInsight
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibrates model parameters using real-time sensor data for accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterEstimationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects faults in vehicle components using specialized algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Estimates system states for accurate vehicle dynamics analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimatedInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizes vehicle performance metrics based on simulation and monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceOptimizationInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides control actions via supervisory controllers for vehicle adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated behavior of vehicle for predictive analysis"
]

instance PredictedStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted future state of vehicle based on current models and data"
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected safety violations requiring immediate attention"
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for optimizing vehicle performance metrics"
]

instance ParameterEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated model parameters for accurate simulation"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected fault in vehicle component requiring maintenance"
]

instance StateEstimatedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated state of vehicle systems for control and monitoring"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of vehicle control systems based on supervisory controllers"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SafetyViolationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Human intervention required for safety violations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment of the car system under study"
    base:contains WheelComponent, ChassisComponent, StructuralElementComponent
]

instance WheelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical wheel component of the vehicle"
]

instance ChassisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Chassis structure of the vehicle"
]

instance StructuralElementComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural elements of the vehicle body"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms adjust model parameters using sensor data to maintain fidelity with the Physical Twin. Monitors validate system performance against safety and optimization criteria, while fault detectors identify anomalies. Corrective actions are initiated by humans or algorithms upon violation detection."
]
